steps.title: Use the positive context
steps.content: The reception has been very good, and the book won an award. The blank must name a positive action that reviewers, booksellers, and librarians might take toward a well-received book.

steps.title: Eliminate negative meanings
steps.content: Choice A means criticized, Choice B means ignored, and Choice D means interpreted wrongly; all conflict with the praise and award. The remaining word means endorsed or suggested positively. The answer is C.
